chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1096 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 30.01.2019. Mr. Muntazir Mehdi Leghari advocate a/w petitioner *** Mr. Rasheed Ahmed Soomro advocate has filed power of M/s Ghulam Mohiuddin & Associates on behalf of HMC. By means of this petition the petitioner, who is widow of late Daniyal, is seeking pension, financial assistance, gratuity, LPR, group insurance and other back benefits of her late husband till filing of this petition and onwards. Today, Mr. Rasheed Ahmed Soomro, learned counsel for HMC has filed a statement alongwith Cheque bearing No.121536930 dated 22.01.2019 amounting to Rs.7,75,326/- in the name of petitioner in respect of family pension w.e.f 30.01.2018 to 31.12.2018 and gratuity and further undertakes that within a period of two months the remaining dues of the petitioner’s husband would be paid to her in accordance with law. Petitioner present alongwith her counsel. She has been handed over aforesaid cheque [in original]. Petitioner and her counsel are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition in view of undertaking given by learned counsel for HMC in respect of remaining dues to be paid within a period of two months. In view of above, instant petition is disposed of in the terms stated above alongwith pending application(s), if any. However, learned counsel for HMC shall submit a compliance report after two months from today. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
